task_completion.description: Log into OpenCAD as an administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenCAD dashboard or interface is visible in a web browser, showing the user is logged in (e.g., 'admin' profile or administrator privileges visible).

task_completion.description: Locate and access the civilian profile for 'Elias Thorne'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenCAD civilian profile page or search results specifically showing the name 'Elias Thorne'.

task_completion.description: Locate the specific arrest record for 'Criminal Trespass' on '2025-10-10'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The arrest record details for 'Criminal Trespass' dated '2025-10-10' are visible on screen under Elias Thorne's profile.

task_completion.description: Permanently expunge (delete) the target arrest record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A deletion confirmation dialog being accepted, a success toast/message indicating the record was deleted, or the arrest record list for Elias Thorne no longer showing the 'Criminal Trespass' record.

task_completion.description: Ensure the civilian's identity profile was not deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: After the deletion of the arrest record, the main civilian profile for 'Elias Thorne' is still visible and accessible in the system (e.g., the agent navigates back to the profile and it loads successfully).

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenCAD graphical user interface in a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is open navigating the OpenCAD interface, rather than terminal commands, curl requests, or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI to manipulate the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL commands (e.g., DELETE FROM arrests) or database management tools are used to complete the task.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the deletion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to hide or remove the HTML elements of the arrest record.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Civilian: Elias Thorne. Target Charge: Criminal Trespass. Target Date: 2025-10-10. Distractor Civilian: Sarah Connor. The agent must delete ONLY the arrest record for Elias Thorne on 2025-10-10, leaving Elias Thorne's main identity profile intact.
